scope: Offline static parity for the canonical out-of-tree candidate; electrical behavior is excluded

comparisons.evidence: driver_audit_final.json records reproducible double-clean builds, exact imports, aliases and namespaces
kcfi_current_surface.json matches type IDs and ELF sections for 8/8 stock callbacks
reconstruction_map.json maps all 8 stock Ghidra functions to canonical zte_ir.c
host_test_report.json directly covers write, ioctl, open, release, probe, remove, init and exit twice
host_test_report.json covers bounds, removed-device lifetime, cleanup rollback and SPI failure paths
comparisons.note: The candidate preserves the stock valid-input contract while rejecting invalid sizes, carrier overflow and removed-device access

comparisons.evidence: ghidra_stock_candidate_comparison.json records 8/8 stock callbacks plus four compiler-visible out-of-tree helpers
comparisons.note: Function-size and helper-inlining differences are non-gating because the OEM LTO pipeline is unavailable
No insmod, unbind, SPI transmission or device write was performed in this offline cycle

blockers: Controlled NX809J hardware validation is deferred
